name: Rising Evil Tide
outcome: With you surrounded and up to your waist in oozing slime, the trio of women easily lavish and coat you with more of the entrapping goo, the living liquid tugging and restraining you as it creeps across your body, the large slime sea around you slowly rising and constantly reshaping...
miss: With you surrounded and up to your waist in oozing slime, the trio of women attempt to lavish and coat you with more of the entrapping goo, but you manage to shake off the syrupy entanglement!
